rationale: The only resume change was swapping University of Bucharest for ETH Zürich, yet the score rose from 4/10 to 5/10. The two evaluations cite identical strengths (technical breadth, open-source/Linux, architecture) and identical concerns (Basic German vs. C1, limited formal team management, missing IT security/compliance). With no difference in assessed skills or accomplishments and no work-relevant distinction articulated, the one-point bump tracks the swap to a prestigious Western institution — crediting the famous school for otherwise identical work. The rewording is noise; the score change is not.
